description: Create comprehensive domain architecture comparison figure: HSPA12B vs canonical HSP70, with pLDDT profile
code:
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Fetch AlphaFold PDB for HSPA12B
pdb_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/files/AF-Q96MM6-F1-model_v6.pdb"
response = requests.get(pdb_url, timeout=60)
pdb_text = response.text

# Parse CA coordinates and pLDDT
ca_coords = {}
plddt_vals = {}
for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
        resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
        x = float(line[30:38].strip())
        y = float(line[38:46].strip())
        z = float(line[46:54].strip())
        bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
        ca_coords[resnum] = np.array([x, y, z])
        plddt_vals[resnum] = bfactor

# Create pLDDT profile plot
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 10))

# Plot 1: pLDDT profile
residues = sorted(plddt_vals.keys())
plddts = [plddt_vals[r] for r in residues]

ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.fill_between(residues, plddts, alpha=0.3, color='steelblue')
ax1.plot(residues, plddts, color='steelblue', linewidth=0.8)
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Very high (>90)')
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='orange', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Confident (>70)')
ax1.axhline(y=50, color='red', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Low (<50)')

# Mark regions
regions = [
    ("N-term\next.", 1, 59, 'lightcoral'),
    ("NBD Lobe I\n(InterPro)", 60, 250, 'lightblue'),
    ("Linker/\nInsert", 251, 312, 'lightyellow'),
    ("NBD Lobe II\n(InterPro)", 313, 529, 'lightgreen'),
    ("C-terminal\nregion", 530, 686, 'plum'),
]
for label, start, end, color in regions:
    ax1.axvspan(start, end, alpha=0.15, color=color)
    ax1.text((start+end)/2, 105, label, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Number')
ax1.set_ylabel('pLDDT')
ax1.set_title('HSPA12B AlphaFold pLDDT Confidence Profile\n(No canonical HSP70 SBD or lid domain detected)')
ax1.set_ylim(0, 115)
ax1.set_xlim(0, 690)
ax1.legend(fontsize=8)

# Plot 2: Domain architecture comparison
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 700)
ax2.set_ylim(-1, 6)

# HSPA8 architecture
y_hspa8 = 4.5
ax2.barh(y_hspa8, 382-5, left=5, height=0.6, color='royalblue', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(193, y_hspa8, 'NBD (ATPase)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white')
ax2.barh(y_hspa8, 543-383, left=383, height=0.6, color='forestgreen', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(463, y_hspa8, 'SBDβ', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white')
ax2.barh(y_hspa8, 646-532, left=532, height=0.6, color='darkorange', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(589, y_hspa8, 'SBDα\n(Lid)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')
# Mark conserved sites
for pos, label in [(9, 'IDLGTTYS'), (199, 'DLGGGTFD'), (341, 'Conserved')]:
    ax2.plot(pos, y_hspa8 + 0.4, 'v', color='red', markersize=6)
    ax2.text(pos, y_hspa8 + 0.55, label, ha='center', fontsize=6, color='red')
ax2.text(-5, y_hspa8, 'HSPA8\n(canonical)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# HSPA12B architecture
y_12b = 2.5
ax2.barh(y_12b, 59-1, left=1, height=0.6, color='lightcoral', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(30, y_12b, 'N-ext\n(disordered)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6)
ax2.barh(y_12b, 250-60, left=60, height=0.6, color='cornflowerblue', alpha=0.5, edgecolor='black', linestyle='--')
ax2.text(155, y_12b, 'NBD Lobe I\n(divergent)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)
ax2.barh(y_12b, 312-251, left=251, height=0.6, color='lightyellow', alpha=0.7, edgecolor='black')
ax2.text(281, y_12b, 'Insert', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6)
ax2.barh(y_12b, 529-313, left=313, height=0.6, color='mediumseagreen', alpha=0.5, edgecolor='black', linestyle='--')
ax2.text(421, y_12b, 'NBD Lobe II\n(divergent)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)
ax2.barh(y_12b, 686-530, left=530, height=0.6, color='plum', alpha=0.5, edgecolor='black', linestyle='--')
ax2.text(608, y_12b, 'C-terminal\n(no SBD/lid)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)
# Mark degenerate motifs
for pos, label in [(66, 'IDFGTT\n(L→F!)'), (320, 'DCGGG\n(D→C!)')]:
    ax2.plot(pos, y_12b + 0.4, 'v', color='darkred', markersize=6)
    ax2.text(pos, y_12b + 0.55, label, ha='center', fontsize=6, color='darkred')
ax2.text(-5, y_12b, 'HSPA12B\n(divergent)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

# Missing elements
ax2.text(450, 0.8, '✗ No Pfam HSP70 (PF00012) match\n'
         '✗ No HSP70 conserved sites (IPR018181)\n'
         '✗ No SBD β-sandwich (IPR029047)\n'
         '✗ No α-helical lid (IPR029048)\n'
         '✗ ~7% identity to canonical HSP70 NBD',
         fontsize=8, va='top', color='darkred',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

ax2.set_xlabel('Residue Position')
ax2.set_title('Domain Architecture Comparison: HSPA12B vs Canonical HSP70 (HSPA8)')
ax2.set_yticks([])
ax2.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax2.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax2.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('hspa12b_domain_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: hspa12b_domain_comparison.png")
